message:
agent: Redesign tool views with consistent collapsible style

- Write, Read, Edit, Generic tools use same pattern as Bash
- Custom collapsible headers with icon, tool name, file path, contextual stats
- Border beam animation on all tools while pending
- Diff stats (+/-) on Edit, line count on Read/Write
- No colored icons, no status badges for success
- WebSearch tool with globe icon
- User messages: removed avatar, right-aligned
- Removed unused Tool/ToolHeader/ToolContent components

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/qnokuk7sdq7zayw26rscol0g
